data.content: Implementation rebased onto current main (d05bed78). Branch: foolery-18b6-notification-focus @ 79b68f0694e6e236fff4b1e317bd185007e9d37c. Quality gates re-verified: lint clean, tsc clean, build successful, 7/7 unit tests pass. Prior Playwright validation (history->active, history->queues, regression on already-on-active) still applies — no functional changes since rebase, only context: unrelated app-update fix from main.
